title: Survivalpack
description: A client side modpack to enhance survival gameplay, with small enhancements and bigger enhancements, where the game still feels mostly vanilla.
body:
# Survivalpack

_Yes, server side is coming... eventually..._

This modpack enhances your survival client-side experience with mods that enchance things from animations and skin layers to adding many features to the inventory and recording your gameplay.

Suggest mods to be added [here](mailto:sps@wc-hub.com) and report bugs [here](mailto:spb@wc-hub.com).


<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>
  
**Why is some content showing weirdly (like overlapping other content or not showing)?**

Content can render weirdly like this if your screen or window is not big enough. We highly recommend using fullscreen mode. It can also render improperly if your GUI scale is too low.


**Why is there a Sodium error when joining some servers?**

Sodium gives errors with some server resource packs. See the disclaimers section.

**Where did the Realms button go?**

The Realms button has moved into the multiplayer menu.

**If player reporting has been removed from the menu, where is it now?**

Press the P key on your keyboard in-game to open the menu.

**Where is BSL shaders and Vanilla Tweaks?**

You need to enable them. Vanilla Tweaks is in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs and BSL Shaders is in Minecraft Settings > Video Settings > Shader Packs.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Disclaimers and recommendations</summary>
  
### Disclaimers

**Some server resource packs give a Sodium error. You can ignore that, and if any real problems happen, that server is not compatible with Sodium. Lubbycraft works with Sodium even though it gives the error.**

There are extra features added for the Lubbycraft server (play.lubcubsgaming.com) that make your experience better on that server. This modpack works with any server or in singleplayer, however you should look at the server rules for that server to make sure every mod here is following those rules.
### Recommendations
We only recommend use of this modpack on survival servers or gamemodes (not creative or minigame).

**We recommend using this modpack with no other modpacks, as other mods can break this modpack. Suggest any mods UPLOADED ON MODRINTH to be added [here](https://wc-hub.com/survivalpack/suggest).**

</details>

Vanilla Tweaks: vanillatweaks.net
